trigger_message: Perform SlashAI Daily Tool Check: Search for recent AI tool updates (Jasper, Writesonic, HubSpot, Semrush, Surfer SEO, Murf AI) AND search for latest trends regarding AI agents, check existing tools.json, note significant updates, check existing articles in src/content/, create update note in pending-updates.md if major updates, build site with npm run build, commit changes to git, and push to GitHub to update the live site
